Justin Drake Proposes Ethereum Beam Chain Upgrade at Devcon 2024
articles.description: Blockchain researcher Justin Drake unveiled the Ethereum Beam Chain concept during Devcon in Bangkok. This proposed overhaul aims to consolidate several key advancements in the network. The proposed Beam Chain will consolidate native support for zero-knowledge proofs and rapid finality into a single upgrade for the Ethereum network.
